# WebLab Website — Project Memory

## Stack
- Next.js 16.1.6, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion v12, TypeScript
- No tailwind.config.ts — design tokens live in `src/app/globals.css` @theme block
- App Router with `src/` directory, `@/*` import alias

## Project structure
```
src/app/         — page.tsx, layout.tsx, globals.css, services/, about/, contact/
src/components/  — layout/ \(Navbar, Footer\), ui/ \(AnimatedSection, ServiceCard, BookingCTA, ChatbotPlaceholder\), home/ \(AnimatedHero, HeroWrapper, SocialProofBar, ProblemSolution, ServicesOverview, HowItWorks\)
src/lib/         — constants.ts \(services, nav, site config\), metadata.ts
src/types/       — index.ts \(Service, NavLink, SiteConfig\)
```

## Key decisions
- Accent: Electric Blue #3B82F6, Background: #0A0A0A
- All booking CTAs use `NEXT_PUBLIC_BOOKING_URL` env var \(currently `#book-a-call`\)
- GHL embed placeholders: `#ghl-calendar-embed` and `#ghl-form-embed` in contact page
- `AnimatedHero` uses `HeroWrapper.tsx` \('use client'\) because Next.js 16 forbids `ssr:false` in Server Components
- Framer Motion v12: use cubic-bezier arrays `[0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94]` instead of string `'easeOut'`
- `.bin/next` must be a symlink to `../next/dist/bin/next` \(not a file copy\)

## Build
- `npm run build` passes with 0 errors, all 4 routes are static
- Security headers: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy all present
- GHL CSP allowlist in next.config.ts
EOF
